query: UPDATE landingPages SET originalAngle = JSON_OBJECT('eyebrowHeadline', 'SPECIAL OFFER', 'mainHeadline', 'Transform Your Results Today', 'subheadline', 'Discover how to achieve your goals', 'primaryCta', 'Get Started Now', 'asSeenIn', JSON_ARRAY('Featured'), 'quizSection', JSON_OBJECT('question', 'What is your biggest challenge?', 'options', JSON_ARRAY('Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C', 'Option D'), 'answer', 'Option A'), 'problemAgitation', 'Many people struggle with this challenge every day.', 'solutionIntro', 'There is a proven solution that works.', 'whyOldFail', 'Traditional methods do not work because they miss the core issue.', 'uniqueMechanism', 'Our unique system addresses the root cause.', 'testimonials', JSON_ARRAY(JSON_OBJECT('headline', 'Life-Changing Results', 'quote', 'This completely transformed my approach.', 'name', 'A Satisfied Customer', 'location', 'Worldwide')), 'insiderAdvantages', 'Get exclusive access to proven strategies.', 'scarcityUrgency', 'Limited spots available this month.', 'shockingStat', 'Studies show this approach works 10x better.', 'timeSavingBenefit', 'Save hours every week with this system.', 'consultationOutline', JSON_ARRAY(JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Assessment', 'description', 'We evaluate your situation'), JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Strategy', 'description', 'We create a custom plan'), JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Implementation', 'description', 'We help you succeed'))) WHERE originalAngle IS NULL;
